title: Issue 2262 dependency-scoped proof subjects

retention.reason: completed-plan cleanup retained compact closeout evidence instead of a full execplan archive

outcome: Proof receipts now bind to content-addressed dependency-scoped subjects and expose reusable, partial, stale, incompatible, and unverifiable freshness decisions for consumers.
